title: Linda Adade
text: I am a Master’s student in Geography at the University of Oregon. My research explores why development unfolds unevenly across places and how economic processes shape opportunities for growth and transformation. My current work examines the spatial distribution of Chinese-financed infrastructure projects across Africa and what these patterns reveal about broader processes of development and spatial inequality.
